items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter 4 covers gradient-based optimization and the role of learning rate in descent methods.

items.title: Convex Optimization (Boyd & Vandenberghe)
items.author: Stephen Boyd, Lieven Vandenberghe
items.note: Gradient descent and convergence on convex objectives—contrast with non-convex deep learning practice.

items.title: PyTorch SGD optimizer documentation
items.author: PyTorch Team
items.note: Implements θ ← θ − η∇L; batch size determines whether each step is full-batch or mini-batch GD.

items.title: Learning representations by back-propagating errors (Rumelhart et al., 1986)
items.author: David E. Rumelhart, Geoffrey E. Hinton, Ronald J. Williams
items.note: Seminal paper connecting efficient gradient computation to training layered networks.
